description: One-letter typo in hero headline (store -> stores)
notes: Plan hypothesized strict would catch this. Empirically a single trailing letter at 1440x900 produces ~0.40% AE — below strict's 0.5% threshold and inside its ambiguity band, where LM tiebreak called the pages 'identical'. Expectation softened to null: question is whether strict should be tightened or whether typos are genuinely outside its scope.
